---
description: "Debug a failing test, error, or unexpected behavior."
mode: agent
---

# Debug

Debug this problem: {{problem}}

1. Reproduce or locate the failure — read error output, logs, or test results.
2. Narrow down the root cause — trace from the error back to the faulty code.
3. Apply the minimal fix.
4. Re-run the failing check to verify the fix.
5. Report what was wrong, what was fixed, and any residual risk.
